label: Daily RSS Summary (Feeds workspace)
description: Fetch + summarize enabled RSS feeds from a feeds workspace and write the markdown summary back into the workspace.

job.title: Daily RSS summary
job.instructions: Call the tool feeds_summarize for the target feeds workspace. If workspace_id is not provided, first call feeds_workspaces and choose the most relevant feeds workspace. Use language=de, enabled_only=true, deliver_to_chat=true. The tool writes latest_summary/history into the workspace and also posts the markdown into a personal chat conversation. After the tool call, reply with a 1-line status including items summarized, delivered_to_chat, and any errors.
